name: Nue.io
description: Composable quote-to-revenue platform unifying CPQ, subscription changes, usage billing, and invoicing for SaaS and AI.

seo.title: Nue.io — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Nue.io: Composable quote-to-revenue platform unifying CPQ, subscription changes, usage billing, and invoicing for SaaS and AI.

when_to_use: Quoting with CPQ then auto-generating subscription contracts
Handling mid-cycle upgrade/downgrade billing for SaaS
Usage metering tied to subscription billing in a single platform
Revenue recognition automation synced to Salesforce and NetSuite

pros: Composable architecture; bolts onto existing stacks
Unifies CPQ, subscriptions, usage, and invoicing
Strong for AI/SaaS hybrid pricing models
cons: Newer platform; fewer battle-tested enterprise deployments
Composability adds setup decisions and complexity
Docs still catching up with product scope
review.verdict: Modern composable quote-to-revenue for AI-era SaaS; promising but still earning its enterprise stripes.
review.best_for: Salesforce-based SaaS and AI companies with hybrid subscription plus usage pricing.
review.not_for: Non-Salesforce startups or teams needing a long reference list of Fortune 500 customers.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
